name: commons-crew-vscode
description: Autonomous coding with governed specialists materialized from the labor-commons catalog.

chatParticipants.name: commons-crew
chatParticipants.description: Materializes a governed software specialist from labor-commons and works the task autonomously in your workspace.

commonsCrew.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your inference API key (BYO). Stored in settings — the runtime runs locally in the extension and calls this endpoint directly.

commonsCrew.model.description: Model id. Must support tool calling (e.g. Qwen3 family, Kimi-K2).

commonsCrew.catalogRef.description: labor-commons branch/ref to materialize specialists from.

commonsCrew.autoApprove.description: Auto-approve file writes and command execution. When false, each side-effecting action asks for confirmation (the governance gate).

commonsCrew.maxIterations.description: Maximum autonomous tool-loop iterations per task before stopping.
